# AES-DSD-PROJECT

This is a Vivado project for the Artix-7 FPGA board.

## Getting Started

1. Clone the repository.
2. Open Vivado.
3. Open the `AES-DSD-PROJECT.xpr` file.

*Note: The `.cache`, `.runs`, `.sim`, and other auto-generated directories are deliberately excluded from version control to keep the repository size small.*
